title: Cashmere Blend Sweater
shortDescription: Luxuriously soft cashmere blend in a relaxed fit
description: Wrap yourself in the ultimate comfort with our Cashmere Blend Sweater. Crafted from a premium mix of wool and cashmere, this sweater delivers an incredibly soft hand feel with lasting warmth. The relaxed silhouette drapes beautifully and pairs effortlessly with tailored trousers or your favorite jeans. Ribbed cuffs and hem add subtle structure to the easy-going shape.

details.care: Dry clean only

shippingInfo: Free shipping on orders $99+. Delivery in 3-5 business days.

title: Silk Midi Dress

description: An effortlessly elegant midi dress cut from pure mulberry silk. The fluid fabric moves with you while the cinched waist and subtle A-line skirt create a universally flattering shape. Perfect for evening dinners, gallery openings, or any occasion that calls for understated glamour. Features a concealed back zip and adjustable spaghetti straps.

details.care: Dry clean recommended. Cool iron on reverse.
details.fit: Slim fit through bodice, A-line skirt

shippingInfo: Free shipping on orders $99+. Delivery in 3-5 business days.

title: Oversized Linen Shirt

details.care: Machine wash cold. Tumble dry low.

title: Ribbed Knit Turtleneck

details.care: Machine wash cold. Lay flat to dry.

title: Leather Tote Bag

description: A daily companion built to last a lifetime. Our Leather Tote is crafted from full-grain vegetable-tanned leather that develops a rich patina with use.
